mapper.delete: /* ProductImageMapper.deleteByPrdSn */ DELETE FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRD_SN = #{prdSn}
mapper.select: /* ProductImageMapper.findImagesByPrdSn */ SELECT pi.FL_SN AS flSn, CONCAT(f.FL_PATH, '/', f.FL_SAVE_NM) AS url FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE pi JOIN FILES f ON f.FL_SN = pi.FL_SN WHERE pi.PRD_SN = #{prdSn} ORDER BY pi.PRD_IMG_SORT_NO ASC
mapper.insert:
/* ProductImageMapper.insertAll */ INSERT INTO PRODUCT_IMAGE (PRD_SN, FL_SN, PRD_IMG_RPRS_YN, PRD_IMG_SORT_NO) VALUES
(#{img.prdSn}, #{img.flSn}, #{img.prdImgRprsYn}, #{img.prdImgSortNo})
